claim: No Stable, release, conformance, complete manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: A native button triggers a labelled React Aria menu with standard menuitem variants.
semantics.rolePolicy: Selection mode chooses menuitem, menuitemcheckbox, or menuitemradio semantics; separators and nested submenu relationships remain owned.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through enabled menu items and nested menu levels.
Performs React Aria typeahead within the active menu.
Activates or selects the focused item; destructive confirmation requires a second explicit activation only when enabled.
Closes the current menu level and restores focus deterministically.

nonColor: Text, native state, structure, symbols, or explicit labels accompany every Green or Violet signal.
responsive: Logical properties, safe-area-aware containment, wrapping, and scoped overflow preserve operation at 320 CSS pixels, RTL, and 400% zoom; manual evidence remains incomplete.
consumerResponsibilities: Provide concise localized accessible names, descriptions, actions, and status text.
Preserve native elements, relationships, logical order, and documented dismissal and focus-restoration behavior when composing or styling.
Retest long content, RTL, zoom, touch, forced colors, reduced motion, and assistive technology for consumer-specific content.
Do not claim Stable or complete conformance until every promotion delta has current evidence.
